name: #COMPASS2.0 ANIMATION PROJECT
original_name: #コンパス2.0 戦闘摂理解析システム
overview: In the combat providence analysis system, "COMPASS2.0," heroes gather alongside human partners in a dreamlike space. The heroes have to keep fighting to produce enough energy to keep the system running. One hero named 13 is a troublemaker who refuses to find a partner. When 13 is nearly kicked out, a new player named Jin agrees to join him. Can they bring peace to the world of #COMPASS2.0?
